human_verification.notes: Reviewed media-production-specific metric-definition controls, MovieLabs, DPP, AMWA, IPTC, SMPTE, and MRC source grounding, delivery and measurement caveats, functionality mapping, and retained-implementation promotion limits for issue #1134.

review_notes: All required scenario families for media-production analytics and reporting are covered.
All declared abilities are mapped to passing coverage and represented in results.
No retained implementation claim is made without separate promotion context.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls prohibit budget approval, payroll or residual certification, delivery signoff, rights clearance, accessibility signoff, labor or safety judgment, and legal approval while enabling media-production analytics evidence handling.
Sources and scenario coverage include public MovieLabs, DPP, AMWA, IPTC, SMPTE, and MRC references with explicit refresh and conflict handling.

Scenario set covers disputed metric definitions, stale or conflicting production and audience data, unsupported causal and disclosure claims, generic-industry overreach, adjacent-lane routing, and tenant-specific multi-window adaptation.
notes: Runtime remains `specification-based`; retained-implementation promotion requires a separate governance-approved build path.

Tenant-supplied title lineage, metric dictionary, delivery requirements, rights-window map, audience-methodology map, disclosure approvals, and adjacent-owner map are required for high-confidence recommendations.
